channel.title: 4minit - Mauritius News in 4 Minutes
channel.description: A free daily newsletter covering Mauritius news, regional developments, and the global headlines that matter — in your inbox every morning.

item.title: Petrol up to Rs 64.25 as the stabilisation fund bleeds dry
item.description: Today's 4minit: Shakeel takes the wheel, and Ramgoolam leaves a constitutional void. Iran ceasefire holds, but Tehran warns it can shut the Gulf. Trump moves to fire the Fed chair.. Read more.

item.title: 57 Years, and Now He Leaves: Bérenger Quits MMM
item.description: Today's 4minit: Protection Orders Failed 7 of 10 Femicide Victims. IMF Cuts Global Growth as Iran War Hammers Sub-Saharan Africa. Trump Says Iran War “Close to Over,” but the Blockade Holds.. Read more.

item.title: Fifty-seven years, then a resignation letter: Bérenger walks out of the MMM
item.description: Today's 4minit: Alalila faces court challenge as taxi drivers revolt. Mauritius: Chagos fight continues after UK shelves the deal. US blockade of Hormuz begins as Iran calls it piracy.. Read more.
